rationale: Clean execution of Option 2. The redesign removes the cold-start modal in favor of a checkbox-driven selection that pre-seeds arms with `(harness, provider, model)` from the rollup rows, gated button states match the AC precisely, and the e2e suite covers the three required assertions (0/1 disabled, 2+ enabled, pre-population) plus the empty-table hidden case. Resolver untouched, so perf AC is satisfied by construction.
